---
title: "Now"
title-block-banner: false
---

A few things keep me busy these days:

## Kids

- Raising 2 kids (8 and 5) and spending 12 hours a day with them when school is closed

## Research 

::: {.callout-tip}

## Big picture question

How to achieve carbon neutraliy by mid-century? How to make the energy transition to achieve this goal more:

- Sustainable (energy and environment)
- Resilient (energy and climate) 
- Equiable (energy and justice) 

:::

- I'm working with EDF on the Multi-Country Electricity Transition Potential and Challenges Project  
- I'm working on a grant to study the climate, air pollution, and human health effect of imported solar PV  
- I'm collaborating with LBL on power system decarbonization: we are organizing an Special Issue and a Workshop


I welcome collaborations on:

- Clean energy global supply chain
- Power system decarbonization modeling
- Just transition
- Electricity-water-carbon nexus  
- Other interdisciplinary aspects of carbon neutrality 


## Teaching

- I'm teaching PAF 9174 [Program Evaluation](https://drganghe.github.io/program-evaluation) for the Executive MPA program
